act4BeatOfDeathPower.title: Beat of Death
act4BeatOfDeathPower.description: Whenever the player plays a card, deal {Amount} damage to them.
act4BeatOfDeathPower.smartDescription: Whenever the player plays a card, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to them.

act4InvinciblePower.title: Invincible
act4InvinciblePower.description: Can only lose up to {Amount} HP each turn.
act4InvinciblePower.smartDescription: Can only lose up to [blue]{CurrentCap}[/blue] HP this turn.
ACT4_INVINCIBLE_POWER.title: Invincible
ACT4_INVINCIBLE_POWER.description: Can only lose up to {Amount} HP each turn.
ACT4_INVINCIBLE_POWER.smartDescription: Can only lose up to [blue]{CurrentCap}[/blue] HP this turn.
act4PainfulStabsPower.title: Painful Stabs
act4PainfulStabsPower.description: Whenever this creature deals attack damage, shuffle a Wound into the target's discard pile.
act4PainfulStabsPower.smartDescription: Whenever this creature deals attack damage, shuffle [blue]{Wounds}[/blue] Wound cards into the target's discard pile.
